understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on the grid, while avoiding spike tiles (`u`/`v`) that end the run immediately. The game consists of multiple levels, each with 2 attempts and a 50-turn budget per attempt. Primary actions are horizontal movement (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) and clicking to remove breakable blocks.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement works by choosing MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT, which shifts the player one tile horizontally, then automatically continues in the current gravity direction (DOWN = toward y=0/top of grid; UP = toward higher y/bottom) until landing on a solid tile. CLICK removes breakable blocks (`x`) at target positions without advancing any moving platform timer. Gravity was consistently DOWN in this episode. No hazards were encountered, and UNDO was not used. Each action (move or click) consumes one step from the remaining budget.
